'''旧暦3月16日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[1017年]]_月_日） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安]]4年（[[1174年]]_月_日） - [[後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561年]]_月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉景虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[1600年]]_月_日） - ウイリアム・アダムス（[[三浦按針]]）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていたオランダ船リーフデ号が豊後に漂着
== 誕生日 == * [[文化]]3年（[[1806年]]_月_日） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855年]]） * [[天保]]3年（[[1832年]]_月_日） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛文]]2年（[[1662年]]_月_日） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月15日 (旧暦)|3月15日]] 翌日[[3月17日 (旧暦)|3月17日]] - 前月[[2月16日 (旧暦)|2月16日]] 翌月[[4月16日 (旧暦)|4月16日]] *新暦[[3月16日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月16日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1174年]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561年]]_月_日<!--3月31日,(閏3月)4月30日-->） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉景虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていたオランダ船リーフデ号が豊後に漂着
== 誕生日 == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月16日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1174年]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561年]]_月_日<!--3月31日,(閏3月)4月30日-->） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていた[[オランダ]]船[[リーフデ号]]が[[豊後国|豊後]]に漂着
== 誕生日 == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596年]]）

== できごと == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1174年]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561年]]_月_日<!--3月31日,(閏3月)4月30日-->） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていた[[オランダ]]船[[リーフデ号]]が[[豊後国|豊後]]に漂着

== 忌日 == * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596年]]）

== できごと == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1174年]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561年]]_月_日<!--3月31日,(閏3月)4月30日-->） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていた[[オランダ]]船[[リーフデ号]]が[[豊後国|豊後]]に漂着
== 誕生日 == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

revision.text:
{{Lunar March}} '''March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 16'''<!--Lunar March16 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1174年]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561年]]_月_日<!--3月31日,(閏3月)4月30日-->） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていた[[オランダ]]船[[リーフデ号]]が[[豊後国|豊後]]に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903年]]）
== Deaths == * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

[[sn:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[寛仁]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1017]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1174]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561]]_月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1600]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていた[[オランダ]]船[[リーフデ号]]が[[豊後国|豊後]]に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]]）
== Deaths == * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[寛仁]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1017]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1174]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561]]_月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1600]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていた[[オランダ]]船[[リーフデ号]]が[[豊後国|豊後]]に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]]）
== Deaths == * [[寛文]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1662]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596]]）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: attempting a full on mass replacement of all the era names
revision.text:
[[sn:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}}1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1017]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]]4th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1174]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4th year（[[1561]]_月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]]5th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1600]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていた[[オランダ]]船[[リーフデ号]]が[[豊後国|豊後]]に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1806]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855]]） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1832]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]]）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1662]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855]]） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[4月15日]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[4月19日]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が[[平清盛]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[4月29日]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[5月4日]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[4月16日]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[5月4日]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1596]] ）

[[sn:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が[[平清盛]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[March 16 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が[[平清盛]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

[[sn:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が[[平清盛]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

[[sn:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[qq74]] [[April 19]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が[[平清盛]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[qq74]] [[April 19]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が[[平清盛]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1596]] ）

== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が[[平清盛]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "後白河天皇" to "Emperor Go-Shirakawa"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が[[Taira no Kiyomori]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、江戸幕府[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages to be translated]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[摂政]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が[[Taira no Kiyomori]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[実業家]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[Businessperson]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）

[[sn:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[Regent]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が[[Taira no Kiyomori]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[Businessperson]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[Regent]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が[[Taira no Kiyomori]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[Businessperson]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[Businessperson]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）

[[sn:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[Regent]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が[[Taira no Kiyomori]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[Businessperson]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] [[zh:三月十六]] [[en:draft:March 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[Regent]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が[[Taira no Kiyomori]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[Businessperson]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[Regent]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が[[Taira no Kiyomori]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[Businessperson]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1017]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]] が[[Regent]] に就任 * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1174]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が[[Taira no Kiyomori]] の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]] の譲を受けて[[関東管領]] となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] * [[Keichō]] 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1600]] [[April 29]] ） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]] （三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]] らが乗っていた[[オランダ]] 船[[リーフデ号]] が[[豊後国|豊後]] に漂着
== Births == * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[May 4]] ） - [[藤田東湖]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} （+ [[1855]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 16]] ） - [[古河市兵衛]] 、[[Businessperson]] ・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 4]] ） - [[松平信綱]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1596]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十六]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1017]] {{ill|April 15|ja|4月15日}}) – The eldest son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長}} (namely, {{ill|Yoritomo|ja|藤原頼通}}) was appointed regent. * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1174]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇}} visited the separate villa of {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|ja|平家}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1600]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日}}) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period).
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文政|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1806]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日}}) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[1855]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日}}) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[1903]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1662]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日}}) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1596]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1017]] {{ill|April 15|ja|4月15日}}) – The eldest son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長}} (namely, {{ill|Yoritomo|ja|藤原頼通}}) was appointed regent. * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1174]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇}} visited the separate villa of {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|ja|平家}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1600]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日}}) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1017]] {{ill|April 15|ja|4月15日|12=draft}}) – The eldest son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長|12=draft}} (namely, {{ill|Yoritomo|ja|藤原頼通|12=draft}}) was appointed regent. * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1174]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=draft}} visited the separate villa of {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|ja|平家|12=draft}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1600]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft}}) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period).
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1806]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[1855]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日|12=draft}}) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[1903]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1662]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1596]]).

== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1017]] {{ill|April 15|ja|4月15日|12=draft}}) – The eldest son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長|12=draft}} (namely, {{ill|Yoritomo|ja|藤原頼通|12=draft}}) was appointed regent. * [[Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1174]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=draft}} visited the separate villa of {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|ja|平家|12=draft}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1600]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft}}) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period).
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1806]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[1855]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日|12=draft}}) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[1903]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1662]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1596]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月16日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1017年]][[4月15日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の長男・[[藤原頼通|頼通]]が[[摂政]]に就任 * [[承安 (日本)|承安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1174年]][[4月19日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が[[平清盛]]の福原別邸へ行幸 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561年]]_月_日<!--3月31日,(閏3月)4月30日-->） - 長尾景虎が[[上杉憲政]]の譲を受けて[[関東管領]]となり上杉政虎と改名。後の[[上杉謙信]] * [[慶長]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[4月29日]]） - [[ウィリアム・アダムス]]（三浦按針）、[[ヤン・ヨーステン]]らが乗っていた[[オランダ]]船[[リーフデ号]]が[[豊後国|豊後]]に漂着
== 誕生日 == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[5月4日]]） - [[藤田東湖]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1855年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[4月16日]]） - [[古河市兵衛]]、[[実業家]]・古河財閥創立（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月4日]]） - [[松平信綱]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1596年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – The eldest son of [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] (namely, [[:en:Fujiwara no Yorimichi|Yoritomo]]) was appointed regent. * [[:en:Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1174|1174]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1855|1855]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1596|1596]]). == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – The eldest son of [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] (namely, [[:en:Fujiwara no Yorimichi|Yoritomo]]) was appointed regent. * [[:en:Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1174|1174]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1855|1855]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1596|1596]]). == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – The eldest son of [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] (namely, [[:en:Fujiwara no Yorimichi|Yoritomo]]) was appointed regent. * [[:en:Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1174|1174]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1855|1855]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1596|1596]]). == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – The eldest son of [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] (namely, [[:en:Fujiwara no Yorimichi|Yoritomo]]) was appointed regent. * [[:en:Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1174|1174]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1855|1855]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1596|1596]]). == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – The eldest son of [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] (namely, [[:en:Fujiwara no Yorimichi|Yoritomo]]) was appointed regent. * [[:en:Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1174|1174]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1855|1855]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1596|1596]]). == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十六]][[zh:三月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十六]][[zh:三月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十六]][[zh:三月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839338]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 16|qq=March 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – The eldest son of [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] (namely, [[:en:Fujiwara no Yorimichi|Yoritomo]]) was appointed regent. * [[:en:Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1174|1174]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1855|1855]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1596|1596]]). == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十六]][[zh:三月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十六]][[zh:三月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十六]][[zh:三月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839338]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 16|qq=March 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1017|1017]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – The eldest son of [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] (namely, [[:en:Fujiwara no Yorimichi|Yoritomo]]) was appointed regent. * [[:en:Jōan (era)|承安]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1174|1174]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1855|1855]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1596|1596]]). == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|15|3|17|2|16|4|3|0316|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|WD=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1017|en|1017|WD=Q19249|lt=1017|1=1017}} {{ill|April 15|en|April 15|WD=Q2497|lt=April 15|1=April 15}}) – The eldest son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|WD=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} (namely, {{ill|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|en|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|WD=Q1370620|lt=Yoritomo|1=Fujiwara no Yorimichi}}) was appointed regent. * {{ill|Jōan (era)|en|Jōan (era)|WD=Q1194188|lt=承安|1=Jōan (era)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1174|en|1174|WD=Q19690|lt=1174|1=1174}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19|1=April 19}}) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}} _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29|1=April 29}}) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunka|1=Bunsei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1806|en|1806|WD=Q6903|lt=1806|1=1806}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|WD=Q2549|lt=May 4|1=May 4}}) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1855|en|1855|WD=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1832|en|1832|WD=Q7584|lt=1832|1=1832}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died {{ill|1903|en|1903|WD=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1662|en|1662|WD=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|WD=Q2549|lt=May 4|1=May 4}}) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born {{ill|1596|en|1596|WD=Q6785|lt=1596|1=1596}}). == Commemorations ==

{{Not to be confused with|March 16|qq=March 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1017|en|1017|qid=Q19249|lt=1017|1=1017}} {{ill|April 15|en|April 15|qid=Q2497|lt=April 15|1=April 15}}) – The eldest son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} (namely, {{ill|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|en|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|qid=Q1370620|lt=Yoritomo|1=Fujiwara no Yorimichi}}) was appointed regent. * {{ill|Jōan (era)|en|Jōan (era)|qid=Q1194188|lt=承安|1=Jōan (era)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1174|en|1174|qid=Q19690|lt=1174|1=1174}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|qid=Q2523|lt=April 19|1=April 19}}) – Emperor {{ill|Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317984}} visited the separate villa of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1561|en|1561|qid=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}} _month_ day) – Nagao Kagetora received a mandate from Uesugi Norimasa, was appointed Kantō Kanrei, and changed his name to Uesugi Kenshin. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|qid=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|qid=Q2535|lt=April 29|1=April 29}}) – The Dutch ship “Leifde” drifted ashore in Bungo Province during a period of military mobilization led by William Adams (Eiroku period). == Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunka|1=Bunsei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1806|en|1806|qid=Q6903|lt=1806|1=1806}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|qid=Q2549|lt=May 4|1=May 4}}) – Fujita Tōko, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1832|en|1832|qid=Q7584|lt=1832|1=1832}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|qid=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – Furukawa Shihei, a businessperson who founded the Furukawa conglomerate (died {{ill|1903|en|1903|qid=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1662|en|1662|qid=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|qid=Q2549|lt=May 4|1=May 4}}) – Matsudaira Nobutsuna, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born {{ill|1596|en|1596|qid=Q6785|lt=1596|1=1596}}). == Commemorations ==
